author: SantiMod
content:
BREAKING: YieldGuildGames commits to $1 Million purchase of Star Atlas game assets!    

That includes several already acquired Calico Guardian, Opal Jetjet & Pearce X4 spaceships.  

  Read the details of our continued strategic metaverse partnership: https://medium.com/star-atlas/yield-guild-games-commits-1-million-for-star-atlas-game-assets-441076da533e
